description:
## app [1.12.5](https://github.com/SilvaTechB/silva-manager/compare/v1.12.4...v1.12.5) (2026-03-28)


### Bug Fixes

* Fix changelog URL derivation referencing wrong repository (SilvaApp/morphe-patches → SilvaTechB/silva-patches)

### Improvements

* Home screen brand label now displayed in a polished pill badge
* App cards updated with deeper frosted glass gradients and stronger border contrast
* "Other apps" button redesigned with glassmorphism gradient border and Apps icon
* Bottom action bar buttons now display text labels alongside icons for improved clarity
